description: Canonical registry of the Java HTTP services bundled under resources/. Consumed by setup-service.sh (via lib/manifest.py) and the sibling general-agent-eval Docker runner. Single source of truth: do not duplicate these recipes in the shell scripts. Each service may carry an optional `rest_assured` block (target_pom relative to the service repo root, group_id, artifact_id, version or null to inherit a Spring Boot dependency-management BOM, scope, optional exclusions list of group_id/artifact_id pairs for transitive deps that clash with the host project, e.g. under a maven-enforcer dependencyConvergence rule) consumed by the general-agent-eval runner's --inject-rest-assured step to provision RestAssured as a test dependency before the agent runs; omit the block to skip injection.

placeholders.${PORT}: HTTP port the service is launched on (default_port unless overridden via --port/PORT).
placeholders.${ARTIFACT}: Absolute path of the built artifact resolved from artifact_glob (only for run commands that need it).

rest_styles.spring-mvc: Spring MVC, server-rendered; limited JSON endpoints.
rest_styles.servlet-mvc: Servlet/JSP/Stripes web app, HTML responses (not a REST API).
rest_styles.custom-http: Hand-rolled HTTP server exposing a JSON API.

features-service.description: Features Model microservice (Spring Boot 1.3.3 + Jersey JAX-RS).
features-service.notes: Embedded in-memory H2, auto-seeded from data.sql. JDK 8 ONLY: the Spring Boot 1.3.3 / QueryDSL 3.7.2 / Jersey stack fails to build or run on JDK 11+. No actuator; /products is the readiness probe.

restcountries.description: REST Countries API (RESTEasy JAX-RS on embedded Jetty).
restcountries.notes: Country data ships as classpath JSON; no DB or network needed. JDK 8 ONLY: RESTEasy 3.1.4 and the 2014-era jetty-maven-plugin 9.2.2 depend on javax.* removed in JDK 11+. Read endpoints under /rest/v2 and /rest/v1; avoid POST /rest/v2/contribute (Stripe).

languagetool.description: LanguageTool embedded HTTP server (com.sun HttpServer JSON API).
languagetool.notes: Heavy multi-module build (~35 language modules); pre-warm ~/.m2 and skip tests. The server binds localhost-only by default, so --public is required to reach it from outside the container. The run command cd's into the assembled distribution so the jar's relative Class-Path and unpacked language resources resolve; the assembly nests a base directory, hence the double LanguageTool-*/ glob. Optional n-gram/ML data is left off (large downloads). DB only used if databaseDriver is configured (it is not). The rest_assured exclusions satisfy the parent POM's dependencyConvergence enforcer rule: rest-assured 4.5.1 pulls commons-lang3 3.11 and commons-codec 1.11, clashing with the project's 3.9/1.12; the host versions serve the test classpath instead.

sample.daytrader8.description: DayTrader 8 Jakarta EE 8 trading benchmark on Open Liberty (JAX-RS + JSF).
sample.daytrader8.notes: liberty:run downloads/provisions an Open Liberty runtime on first build (network required). Embedded Derby ships pre-seeded under resources/data/tradedb, so no external DB. The /jaxrs/sync/echoText endpoint is DB-independent (good liveness probe); /rest/quotes/* needs the seeded DB and may require hitting /daytrader/config (TradeBuild) once. Context root /daytrader. Avoid the DB2 path (Dockerfile-db2).

genome-nexus.description: Genome Nexus annotation API (Spring Boot 2.2 multi-module, MongoDB-backed).
genome-nexus.notes: The only service needing an out-of-process datastore. setup-service.sh auto-starts a bundled mongod (pre_run) on an empty database -- exactly how EMB runs it (Testcontainers mongo:3.6.2, dropped/empty, never seeded), so data endpoints (/annotation/**, /version) return empty/not-found while /actuator/health (Mongo reports UP on a reachable empty DB), /swagger-ui.html, and /v2/api-docs work. mongod is pinned to 4.2, the newest server the Spring Boot 2.2 Mongo driver (3.11) supports; -Dspring.cache.type=NONE mirrors EMB. Build is `clean install` (reactor installs sibling modules); the war ignores server.port from properties, so it is set via -Dserver.port. JDK 8 (EMB jdk_8_maven). For populated data instead of empty, point MONGODB_URI at a genomenexus/gn-mongo instance and skip the pre_run mongod.

jpetstore-6.description: MyBatis JPetStore 6 (Spring + Stripes + JSP web app, embedded HSQLDB).
jpetstore-6.notes: NOT a REST API: server-rendered JSP/Stripes returning HTML under /jpetstore/actions/*.action; assertions must target HTML/redirects and many flows need a session (login j2ee/j2ee). Embedded HSQLDB auto-seeds at startup (ephemeral). Cargo downloads Tomcat 9.0.97 from archive.apache.org on first run (network). Profile id is `tomcat9` (the README's tomcat90 does not exist). Uses the mvnw wrapper.

spring-petclinic.description: Spring PetClinic (Spring Boot 3.4 MVC, mostly Thymeleaf UI, H2 default).
spring-petclinic.notes: Default in-memory H2, auto-seeded; no external services. Primarily server-rendered MVC: the only true JSON endpoint is GET /vets (GET /vets.html is HTML); form POSTs are application/x-www-form-urlencoded. Actuator fully exposed at /actuator/health (avoid /livez and /readyz, which exist only under the k8s config). JDK 17. Build skips spring-javaformat/checkstyle so incidental edits do not fail the build. Maven jar is *-SNAPSHOT, Gradle jar is not — always glob, never hard-code.
